title: China-to-India Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.target_requirement: Portable sealed secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes are listed under BIS Scheme II CRS with IS 16046. Battery packs or cells supplied with cordless power tools may therefore need separate BIS CRS registration when they fall within the notified portable application scope.
target_standards: Electronics and Information Technology Goods requirements where applicable
rows.china_equivalent: China evidence may include GB 3883 tool safety plus Chinese battery test reports for cells or packs. These do not replace BIS CRS registration for India when the portable sealed secondary cell or battery is in scope.
rows.gap: Cordless-tool dossiers often treat the tool and battery as one file. India may require separate CRS registration for the battery or cell, plus separate treatment for the charger or adaptor, even if the tool body itself is evaluated under another BIS route.

target.en: Compulsory CRS registration for in-scope sealed secondary cells or batteries listed under Scheme II. IS 16046 is not voluntary for covered products.
target.zh: 对 Scheme II 所列范围内密封二次电芯或电池为强制 CRS 注册。IS 16046 对覆盖产品不是自愿要求。
target.zht: 對 Scheme II 所列範圍內密封二次電芯或電池為強制 CRS 註冊。IS 16046 對覆蓋產品不是自願要求。

cn.en: China battery reports do not create Indian CRS registration.
cn.zh: 中国电池报告不会形成印度 CRS 注册。
cn.zht: 中國電池報告不會形成印度 CRS 註冊。

rows.verdict: Not India-ready for cordless tools until the battery and cell scope is checked against CRS and any required BIS registration is obtained.

rows.requirement: Chargers, Power Adaptors, and Electrical Accessories
rows.target_requirement: Power adaptors and similar electronic apparatus are listed in BIS Scheme II CRS under IS/IEC 62368-1. A power-tool kit with an external charger, adaptor, or PSU should be split into tool body, battery or cell, and charger or adaptor compliance scopes; each component may trigger a different BIS route.
target_standards: IS/IEC 62368-1 for listed power adaptors under CRS
Applicable QCO or CRS category for chargers, adaptors, or accessories
rows.china_equivalent: China tool files may include GB 3883 for the tool and separate charger reports. India still requires component-level BIS scope decisions and CRS registration where the adaptor, charger, or PSU is listed.
china_standards: China charger safety standards where applicable
rows.gap: The common gap is importing a kit under only the tool model number while omitting CRS treatment for the adaptor or charger. India customs and BIS documentation should match the actual components shipped.

target.en: Compulsory where the charger, adaptor, or PSU is listed under CRS or another notified BIS category. IS/IEC 62368-1 is compulsory for listed power adaptors under CRS.
target.zh: 当充电器、适配器或电源列入 CRS 或其他已通知 BIS 类别时为强制要求。IS/IEC 62368-1 对 CRS 所列电源适配器为强制要求。
target.zht: 當充電器、適配器或電源列入 CRS 或其他已通知 BIS 類別時為強制要求。IS/IEC 62368-1 對 CRS 所列電源適配器為強制要求。

cn.en: China charger reports do not replace Indian CRS registration where required.
cn.zh: 中国充电器报告不能替代印度要求的 CRS 注册。
cn.zht: 中國充電器報告不能替代印度要求的 CRS 註冊。

rows.verdict: Conditionally non-compliant until charger, adaptor, and PSU scope is separated from the tool body and any required CRS registration is in place.

rows.target_requirement: BIS operates the Foreign Manufacturers Certification Scheme for foreign manufacturers to obtain a licence to use the Standard Mark on products conforming to Indian Standards, except electronics and IT goods notified by MeitY that follow CRS. China manufacturers and Indian importers should route in-scope products through FMCS, CRS, or the applicable BIS scheme before shipment.
target_standards: BIS CRS for notified Electronics and IT Goods
Applicable QCO, licence, Standard Mark, CoC, or registration requirement
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese factory certification, CCC where relevant, GB 3883 tool safety evidence, and export test reports do not grant permission to use the BIS Standard Mark or clear in-scope notified goods in India.
china_standards: China domestic certification or export test reports
rows.gap: The import gap is procedural as well as technical: the manufacturer or importer must align the BIS licence, registration, marking, model inclusion, factory identity, and shipped SKU before import. A test report alone is not the import route.

target.en: Mandatory for products covered by a BIS QCO or CRS notification before import or placement on the Indian market. The applicable BIS route depends on the notified product category.
target.zh: 对 BIS QCO 或 CRS 通知覆盖的产品，在进口或投放印度市场前为强制要求。适用 BIS 路径取决于已通知产品类别。
target.zht: 對 BIS QCO 或 CRS 通知覆蓋的產品，在進口或投放印度市場前為強制要求。適用 BIS 路徑取決於已通知產品類別。

cn.en: China domestic compliance does not substitute for Indian import certification.
cn.zh: 中国国内合规不能替代印度进口认证。
cn.zht: 中國國內合規不能替代印度進口認證。

rows.verdict: Not import-ready until the applicable BIS route is completed and the licence, registration, mark use, and model coverage match the shipped goods.

rows.requirement: BIS Compulsory Certification and QCO Scope
rows.target_requirement: BIS certification is normally voluntary, but the Indian central government makes compliance compulsory for notified products through Quality Control Orders. For an in-scope power tool, electrical accessory, charger, battery, or cell, the applicable IS standard and BIS mark, licence, certificate, or CRS registration required by the notification are compulsory market-access conditions.
target_standards: BIS Act, 2016 and BIS conformity assessment schemes
Quality Control Orders for notified product categories
Applicable IS standard named in the QCO or CRS schedule [compulsory when notified]
rows.china_equivalent: China power-tool technical files commonly cite the GB 3883 series for hand-held motor-operated electric tools, transportable tools, and lawn and garden machinery. GB 3883 evidence may help engineering comparison but does not replace BIS certification, CRS registration, or QCO compliance for India.
rows.gap: The key gap is assuming that a China domestic safety report is enough for India. Importers must first classify the exact SKU against BIS compulsory certification, Scheme I, Scheme II CRS, Scheme X, and current QCO lists, then obtain the required BIS route before placing or importing in-scope goods.

target.en: Compulsory for notified products under QCOs or CRS schedules. BIS lists compulsory certification products and states that mandatory use of the Standard Mark, licence, or CoC is directed through QCOs.
target.zh: 对 QCO 或 CRS 清单中已通知的产品为强制要求。BIS 列示强制认证产品，并说明通过 QCO 指令强制使用标准标志、许可证或合格证书。
target.zht: 對 QCO 或 CRS 清單中已通知的產品為強制要求。BIS 列示強制認證產品，並說明透過 QCO 指令強制使用標準標誌、許可證或合格證書。

cn.en: China domestic baseline commonly uses GB 3883 series for in-scope power tools.
cn.zh: 中国境内基线通常对适用电动工具采用 GB 3883 系列。
cn.zht: 中國境內基線通常對適用電動工具採用 GB 3883 系列。

rows.verdict: Not India-ready as-is if the file only contains GB 3883 evidence. BIS/QCO scope must be checked by SKU, and any notified product must complete the compulsory BIS route before import or sale.

rows.requirement: IS 302 and Relevant IS Safety Standards
rows.target_requirement: Where an electrical appliance, accessory, or tool-related product is listed in a BIS QCO, the named Indian Standard becomes compulsory for that in-scope product. BIS Scheme I lists multiple IS 302 household and similar electrical appliance parts under electrical appliance QCOs; for power-tool SKUs, the applicable IS must be identified from the notified product description rather than treated as a voluntary design reference.
target_standards: IS 302 series where named by a BIS QCO
Relevant IS standard named by the notified product category
Scheme I (ISI Mark Scheme) for applicable BIS product certification
rows.china_equivalent: GB 3883 series evidence for China can be used for clause mapping, but India certification depends on the Indian Standard and conformity assessment scheme named in the notification.
rows.gap: A frequent documentation gap is labelling BIS or IS safety standards as voluntary. Once the product is covered by a QCO, the cited IS standard is compulsory for the notified scope and must be supported by BIS-recognised testing and the applicable BIS certification route.

target.en: Compulsory when the relevant IS, including IS 302 parts where applicable, is named by a notified QCO. Not a voluntary route for in-scope products.
target.zh: 当相关 IS（包括适用的 IS 302 分部分）被已通知 QCO 指定时为强制要求。对范围内产品不是自愿路径。
target.zht: 當相關 IS（包括適用的 IS 302 分部分）被已通知 QCO 指定時為強制要求。對範圍內產品不是自願路徑。

cn.en: GB 3883 supports China-market safety evidence but is not a BIS licence or CRS registration.
cn.zh: GB 3883 支持中国市场安全证据，但不是 BIS 许可证或 CRS 注册。
cn.zht: GB 3883 支援中國市場安全證據，但不是 BIS 許可證或 CRS 註冊。

rows.verdict: Conditionally non-compliant until the India file identifies the exact notified category, the relevant IS standard, and whether Scheme I, CRS, Scheme X, or another BIS route applies.
